name: Advanced Diagnosis Phase 12 - Guided Acute/Chronic Side-by-Side Assistant
new_features: new Guided Assistant panel with Acute and Chronic modes
side-by-side Case Builder and Guided Questions windows
clickable answer buttons add findings to case builder
diagnosis and remedy focus scores shown live
guided findings can be transferred to main ADX statement and analyzed
note: Guided Assistant is a fast clinic workflow layer built on top of the existing ADX engine. Final clinical decision remains doctor-controlled.
